items.name: 1.0 crystal cross necklace
items.description:
Found in a underground exploration of the Paris catacombs, it is now being displayed at interdolls museum in Paris, France. This one of a kind necklace was crafted by ancient civilizations and worn by many kings and queens until it found its way to the catacombs where that was its resting place for 500 years. 
It is now being sold for 500,000 robux with only 1 copy avaiable worldwide.
--

Buying will greatly support us! 
❦ The interdoll team
